productName: Cookies - Cannabis Terps - Cartridge - 1g - London Pound Cake #75
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with London Pound Cake oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of butter, vanilla, and lemon, with a versatile, anytime balance.
